text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: My head hurts...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I must've been out for a while. When did I—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hey, you. You're finally awake.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon, a talented runner that even a rookie trainer like
myself has heard about, is standing right in front of me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Looks like you're in a state of shock. You just regained consciousness,
so I'd advise you to not overdo it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Now, sit in this chair for me. It's time to relax.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I do as she says and sit on the infirmary stool.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Now... do you know why you're here? Can you recall?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: By the way, I'm the one who carried you here while you were unconscious. So the question is how—and why—did you lose consciousness?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rack my brain for an answer as dull throbbing pain courses through
my head. If I recall, I was walking down the hallway...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hey, heeey, heeeeey! Tachyon, I said waaait!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Why, if it isn't Bakushin O! What's got you this riled up? It's not like
your beloved homeroom was burned to a crisp or anything.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You're right, it wasn't burned to a crisp!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Then all's well that ends well. See you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Your class representative commands you to stop! There's nothing well about any of this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, the classroom is still standing! BUT! Do you understand how
close we got to disaster?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: One corner of the classroom had an eensy bit of smoke, right? Is it really something our class representative should get so upset about?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! H-hmmm... When you put it that way...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You only filled the entire classroom with smoke, so I guess I should let you off this time?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Magnanimity is a virtue, class representative. You would do well to
remember that.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, wait! The teacher even told me eight times to ignore the
excuses and capture you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I won't let you escape, Tachyon!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! I knew that wouldn't work!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Stop right there! BAKUSHIN, BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh! You there—yes, you, the trainer! Don't let Tachyon through!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm? Whoa, there!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm, looks like you remember the events that transpired.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I certainly do, including the fact that the girl in front of me is the
culprit who filled the classroom with smoke.
choice_data_list: Why did you fill the classroom with smoke?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: What a peculiar thing to ask... To further my research. Why else?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Research... Agnes Tachyon's eyes light up as she says the word.
choice_data_list: (I have a weird feeling about this...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Noting to myself that it's probably best to not get too involved with
her, I attempt to stand up—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Creak...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (When did she tie me to this chair?!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Might you be the type who gets lost in their own thoughts? As
someone of the same breed, I understand your confusion all too well.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Out of the kindness of my heart, here's some advice—you'd be wise to
guard yourself better.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
After all, you never know when you might run into a researcher
looking for a spry, healthy adult male to serve as her test subject,
right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
After all, you never know when you might run into a researcher
looking for a spry, healthy adult female to serve as her test subject,
right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As for me, this windfall is certainly welcome. Maybe I should pay my
respects at the shrine.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, everyone at this academy already knows me far too well.
Forget asking for test subjects—everyone runs away from me on sight.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And yet—HA-HA-HA! Never would I have imagined that fresh blood
would show up on my doorstep! What a stroke of luck!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: So, my guinea pig—ah, apologies, I mean rookie trainer.
choice_data_list: Did you just call me a guinea pig?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: An adult needn't worry about such trifling matters.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, I have one special—wait, given your heartiness, I'll
have you drink three of my medicines.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh, the proof is in the pudding—or should I say, the
medicine?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry... Worst case, both of your legs will glow green-gold for a
few hours. A cute side effect, if I say so myself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What I really want to see is the human quadricipital data that I can
collect with this.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's a well-known fact that human and Umamusume body structures are
almost entirely identical, but by comparing data from both, perhaps a
new—

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Tachyon... Are you up to no good again?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Why, if it isn't Cafe! What's the matter? Perhaps you've finally come
to join my experiment—

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Keep dreaming. I came to tell you that the teacher's looking for you. I
think... it's about the upcoming tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Hurry up... and go already. Now... Right now...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, okay... Message received, so don't glare at me like that! Looks
like the experiment will have to be put on hold.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: See you around, rookie trainer!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'll... untie you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stammer out my thanks as I count my lucky stars. I'm saved... At least,
for now.
